def get_weekly_income(self):
        """Ingresos de los últimos 7 días con comparativo."""
        sql = f"""
            SELECT 
                TO_CHAR({self.PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD}, 'ID') as dia_semana,
                TO_CHAR({self.PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD}, 'Day') as nombre_dia,
                SUM({self.AMOUNT_FIELD}) as total
            FROM {self.PAYMENT_TABLE}
            WHERE {self.PAYMENT_DATE_FIELD} >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'
            GROUP BY dia_semana, nombre_dia

    PAYMENT_TABLE = 'payment'
    def get_financial_summary(self):
        """Trae el acumulado de dinero en 3 niveles de tiempo."""
        sql = f"""
            SELECT 
                SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE payment_date::date = CURRENT_DATE) as hoy,
                SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE payment_date >= DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)) as semana,
                SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE payment_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)) as mes,
                COUNT(id) FILTER (WHERE payment_date::date = CURRENT_DATE) as tickets_hoy

class DjangoReportRepository:
    def get_financial_summary(self):
        hoy = timezone.now().date()
        inicio_semana = hoy - timezone.timedelta(days=hoy.weekday())
        inicio_mes = hoy.replace(day=1)
        metrics = Ticket.objects.filter(status="CLOSED").aggregate(
            hoy=Sum('total_paid', filter=Q(exit_time__date=hoy)),
            semana=Sum('total_paid', filter=Q(exit_time__date__gte=inicio_semana)),
            mes=Sum('total_paid', filter=Q(exit_time__date__gte=inicio_mes)),
            tickets_hoy=Count('id', filter=Q(exit_time__date=hoy))
